title: poppler security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[21.01.0-23]
- Bump release for build inheritance
- Resolves: RHEL-131792

[21.01.0-22]
- Check bitmap in combine()
- Resolves: RHEL-131795, RHEL-131792
